name: Chicken Gravy with Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a deep, 1-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish.
2. Add flour and season with salt and pepper to taste. Stir until smooth.
3. Heat the mixture for 1-2 minutes in the Microwave Oven or until lightly browned.
4. Gradually stir in the chicken stock. Add the mushroom slices and continue stirring to combine.
5. Cook uncovered for 4 minutes in the Microwave Oven, stirring every minute to ensure a thickened and smooth gravy.
Makes 1 cup
